ssmincidents.replicationset.CfnAbout: The `AWS::SSMIncidents::ReplicationSet` resource specifies a set of Regions that Incident Manager data is replicated to and the KMS key used to encrypt the data.

ssmincidents.replicationset.DeletionProt.Description: Determines if the replication set deletion protection is enabled or not. If deletion protection is enabled, you can't delete the last Region in the replication set.

ssmincidents.replicationset.Regions.Description: Specifies the Regions of the replication set.

ssmincidents.replicationset.Tags.Description: A list of tags to add to the replication set.
